description: M2 composite safety scores for each Negro Leagues game location, 1936--1948. Higher score = more accessible.
weights_note: These weights are preliminary and subject to Elias review before finalization. See METHODOLOGY.md for rationale.
sundown_note: sundown_distance_inv is set to a neutral placeholder (0.5) for all cities. This component awaits the Loewen Sundown Towns database integration in Chapter 03.
census_source: U.S. Census Bureau, Sixteenth Census of the United States: 1940, Population, Vol. II, Table 35. Public domain.
